programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.5m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos might actually offer a rideable 1.5m left this morning, assuming the offshore wind doesn't shred it completely.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 20.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.7m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.desc:
